data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The service experience is designed for simplicity with minimal choice overload.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined UI with intuitive navigation paths and decision-making flow.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are placed and sized to be easily accessible and clickable.
data.technical_spec: Large, distinguishable buttons and elements within the user interface.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Attractive design is leveraged to enhance perceived usability and user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Use of high-quality visual design, fonts, and animations.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements that relate to each other are placed in close proximity for quick association.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of categories, recommendations, and action buttons.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design aligns with user expectations and existing habits for content consumption.
data.technical_spec: Interface follows conventional streaming service features and navigation styles.
